プロジェクトチーム内でのファイル共有は、業務効率に直結する重要な要素です。FS!: Efficient file sharing within a project team is critical to productivity. FS!QR lets you quickly and securely distribute key documents — design drawings, specifications, progress reports, and more. This is especially valuable in collaborative projects with external partners, where traditional email attachments or cloud account sharing can be impractical. A simple QR code and password is all that's needed. And because files are temporary by design, the risk of data leaks after a project wraps up is kept to a minimum.

取引先とのファイル共有で起きる問題は、送信に失敗することだけではありません。どの: Problems in client file sharing are not limited to failed delivery. Small ambiguities—such as not knowing which version to review, being unable to confirm receipt, or leaving a share active after its deadline—lead to repeated questions and incorrect approvals. This guide organizes the business flow to define before choosing a tool.
共有前に「目的」と「完了条件」を決める: Before Sharing, Define the Purpose and Completion Condition
送る前に、相手にしてほしいことを一文にします。「7月見積書を確認し、金曜日までに: Before sending, state what you want the recipient to do in one sentence, including the item, request, and deadline—for example, “Please review the July estimate and reply with the amount by Friday.” Narrowing the files to those needed for this decision reduces missed checks better than attaching a large set of reference materials.
次に、最終版を誰が承認したかを社内で確認します。ファイル名に案件名と版を入れ、本: Next, confirm internally who approved the final version. Put the project name and version in the filename and repeat that filename in the message so it is easier to catch someone opening the wrong material. When a replacement is made, do not leave the old link and simply write “This is the latest version”; decide which single URL is valid.
案内文はリンク以外の三点を含める: The Message Should Include Three Things Besides the Link
何のための共有か。: What is the purpose of the share?
どのファイルの、どの部分を確認するか。: Which file and which part should be checked?
いつまでに、どの方法で返答するか。: By when and by what method should the recipient reply?
FS!QRのURLを送る場合も、この三点を本文に書きます。パスワードが必要なら、: Include these three points in the message when sending an FS!QR URL. If a password is needed, send it through another channel that can confirm the recipient's identity. Since the message alone may be forwarded, also consider how long email or chat is retained and avoid putting too much confidential information or the filename in it.
受領確認と版管理を手順に入れる: Build Receipt Confirmation and Version Control into the Process
共有ページを作ったことと、相手がファイルを確認できたことは別です。締切がある資料: Creating a sharing page is not the same as confirming that the other person could check the file. For deadline-driven materials, request a short reply such as “Received. I will review it,” and record it on the responsible person's side for important transactions. If the file is replaced, update both the filename and sharing URL and resend the notice so the old version is not used.
FS!QRは、短期間の受け渡しを行うための入口として使えますが、承認履歴、詳細な: FS!QR can serve as an entry point for a short-term handoff, but it does not automatically create approval histories or detailed viewing logs or provide long-term contract storage. When those requirements apply, use it alongside a formal document-management system with clearly separated roles.
受領が確認できたら、保存すべき最終版を社内の指定場所へ移し、共有ページがまだ必要: Once receipt is confirmed, move the final version that must be kept to the designated internal location and check whether the sharing page is still needed. Manually delete shares that are no longer needed and tell the recipient where to save the file on their device and which internal rules apply. Even if you wait for automatic deletion, the person responsible should know how long it will remain available.
個人情報、契約上の秘密情報、監査証跡が必要な資料、輸出管理や業界規制の対象となる: For personal information, contractually confidential information, materials requiring an audit trail, or data subject to export controls or industry regulations, prioritize a company-approved method. Easy delivery is not the same as meeting business requirements. If you introduce FS!QR, write a simple procedure covering purpose, retention period, password delivery, and deletion after completion before using it.
